violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. The scoop for ice cream was just stored in a dish of water in the sink. This needs to be in a dipper well with flowing water to remove debris.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wood supports behind the bar are bare wood. These need to be painted, or sealed.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. There was only two sinks in the facility. One for hand washing and just a single sink. DOH Note: Facility must have a separate designated hand sink and either a 3-compartment sink or commercial dishwasher for cleaning and sanitizing equipment and utensils.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
